title: NEET re-exam: NTA issues safety advisory; sends WhatsApp updates regarding admit cards
content: "NTA is sending reminder SMS and emails to candidates to download their admit cards for the re-examination on Sunday, 21 June 2026," the agency said in a public advisory

title: Cross-voting from BJP embarrasses party, likely to lead to more high command control of Karnataka unit
content: One candidate did not secure the required number of votes in the first round and eventually won with the help of second-preference votes, further embarrassing the party

title: Telegram ban verdict LIVE | Delhi High court declines relief; upholds govt.'s decision for temporary ban
content: Delhi High Court said that the centre followed all norms and due process, adding that the government is empowered under section 69A to block the Telegram

title: Kerala Revised Budget 2026-27 LIVE: V.D. Satheesan's Budget pledges 'New Kerala' with inclusive growth, sustainable development
content: Chief Minister says the government is committed to stimulating the economy through broad-based development strategies, attracting large-scale investments across various sectors, mobilising financial resources for the public exchequer, and ensuring the equitable distribution of wealth

title: India emerging as 'trusted partner' to the world: PM Modi
content: Mr. Modi also said that this is a defining period in India's journey, where aspirations are reaching new heights

title: Karnataka Legislative Council polls: Congress wins five amid cross voting, while BJP wins two
content: The result is also seen as a shot in the arm for Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar, who faced his first election after taking over from Siddaramaiah

title: Congress’s victory and 11 additional votes bolster image of DKS in his first test
content: The Congress held its fort tightly, and the election preparation seems to have been meticulously planned and executed

title: Monsoon delayed: Goa left with one month’s drinking water supply
content: The India Meteorological Department has predicted that rainfall activities will resume in the State by next weekend

title: Monsoon tracker LIVE | India facing 41% rainfall deficit as southwest monsoon stalls over Maharashtra
content: IMD's region-wise departure rainfall map shows that rainfall deficits in central India, east and northeast India, the southern peninsula, and northwest India stand at 67%, 42%, 22%, and 6%, respectively

title: Indian Ocean Rim Association ‘examines’ Canada’s application to become dialogue partner
content: Sanjiv Ranjan, IORA’s Secretary-General, said member states could benefit from Canada’s inclusion into the fold considering its expertise in varied maritime domains.

title: U.P. CM Adityanath accuses SP and Congress of nepotism, corruption
content: He was speaking during a public gathering in Unnao where he inaugurated and laid the foundation stones for 101 development projects valued at over ₹570 crores

title: PM Modi departs for New Delhi after concluding two-nation visit to France, Slovakia
content: Modi addressed the Indian diaspora earlier in the day and said India is emerging as a "trusted partner" to the world

title: Traditional traders seek policy support amid rise of e-commerce, quick-commerce
content: Manohar Agarwal, national co-convenor of Swadeshi Vyapar Manch, expressed concern over the declining interest of the younger generation in family-owned businesses

title: Study finds pesticide residues in breast cancer tissues, raises concerns over exposure risks
content: The findings point to a possible link between environmental exposure and cancer risk, while also highlighting gaps in awareness and safety practices at the grassroots level

title: Kerala’s health machinery goes all out to keep Nipah in check
content: Nipah has once again struck the northern district of Kozhikode in Kerala, with one person testing positive for the zoonotic disease. An attempt to understand the complexities of the disease and the efforts to contain it through interactions with medical experts and relatives of the patient.

title: Sikkim’s home-grown skincare brand enters Bhutan market
content: Founded in 2019, Agapi has been producing handcrafted natural skincare products inspired by the State’s rich biodiversity

title: LIC Housing Finance directed to correct PAN linkage error, pay ₹40,000 compensation to customer in Kalaburagi
content: The Commission also ruled that if the PAN linkage error is not rectified within 45 days, the company will have to pay an additional penalty of ₹500 per day to the complainant until compliance with the order

title: CM Omar Abdullah reviews preparations for annual Pandit pilgrimage in Kashmir
content: Officials said the administration expected an uptick in the number of devotees this year, after a recent successful tour of multiple groups of Pandits to Kashmir to assess the degree of normalcy and dip in militant violence

title: Hopes fade for many as pledged gold goes ‘missing’
content: The alleged gold loan scam at Bank of Baroda is proving to be more than just a banking issue. For farmers, women, and small traders, pledged gold often represents their final lifeline in times of hardship. Now, grappling with uncertainty, borrowers await clarification from the bank. The disappearance of these ornaments has triggered not only financial distress but also deep emotional turmoil among them, explores G.V.R. Subba Rao

title: In Telangana, making more room for bigger harvests
content: With Telangana’s agricultural output rising and warehouses operating at near-full capacity, the need for storage infrastructure is becoming increasingly urgent. The Telangana State Warehousing Corporation is responding with an ambitious expansion drive, building new godowns, setting up its first cold storage facilities and exploring e-commerce logistics. P. Laxma Reddy examines how TGSWC is expanding beyond traditional grain storage to help farmers preserve produce and secure better returns

title: Telegram challenge puts spotlight on Section 69A of the IT Act
content: Using the provision to block an entire platform may infringe on Constitutional rights to freedom of expression and freedom to practise a profession or run a business, similar to a blanket ban on internet services

title: Review of Marathi novellas ‘My Last Autobiography’ and ‘The Woman Who Wore a Hat’
content: The writings of Rajendra Banahatti and Kamal Desai come vibrantly alive in these translations by Jerry Pinto and Shanta Gokhale, respectively

title: Kerala Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan to present Revised Budget in Assembly today
content: The budget will also be the first of the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) government which came to power in Kerala in May after a landslide victory in the April 9 Assembly polls

title: Why is UDF government’s stance on PM-SHRI debated in Kerala? | Explained
content: The decision of the United UDF government to go ahead with PM-SHRI has been celebrated by the BJP as a victory for the Union government’s policies; However, LDF has opposed it, calling it an outcome of the UDF-BJP deal

title: Tamil Nadu government to look for new airport site instead of Parandur
content: TVK is not against development; why should waterbodies, cultivable land be destroyed to build an airport for Chennai, asks Minister for Energy Resources and Law R. Nirmalkumar

title: PM Modi meets leading CEOs in France, discusses plans for India
content: The discussions with the CEOs of the French companies focused on strengthening cooperation across sectors ranging from shipping and logistics to railways, construction and artificial intelligence.

title: Prime Minister to disburse ₹2,400 crore worth incentives to new employees, employers
content: With an outlay of ₹99,446 crore, around 15 lakh beneficiaries will receive the incentive under the Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rojgar Yojana as direct benefit transfer

title: Linguistics over licences in Maharashtra
content: Maharashtra’s Transport Minister has made it mandatory for the State’s taxi and auto drivers to learn Marathi by August 15 or lose their licences. Chinmay R. Gaikwad reports on how RTOs are doubling as classrooms for migrant drivers who are struggling to learn the basics of a new language in just four days of classroom learning. He finds that some drivers are hopeful, while some others feel humiliated

title: After clearing TNPSC Group I exam, civil services aspirant meets her role model J. Radhakrishnan
content: J.J. Jenifer, who has been preparing for the civil services examination with the goal of becoming an IAS officer, cleared the TNPSC Group I examination this year

title: Telegram evolved into ‘new dark web’: Centre
content: Relying upon an I4C assessment, the government says the app’s architecture and privacy features have made it a preferred tool for cybercriminals, fraud networks, extremist and terror groups, and operators involved in examination paper leaks

title: Indira Canteen tops Kochi Corpn.’s Budget wish list
content: Among the Corporation’s key demands are a 190 MLD water treatment plant, a waste-to-energy project, road projects to improve mobility, and the Vembanad Lake Rejuvenation Mission

title: Woman ends life; husband, in-laws held for dowry harassment
content: The police investigation revealed that members of the groom’s family allegedly began to demand 50 grams of gold from Vishakha’s parents soon after the marriage

title: Mallathahalli residents say flooding fears are back as drain remains blocked
content: According to residents, the flooding started after a natural rainwater flow path in the area was disrupted, causing stormwater to accumulate during periods of intense rainfall

title: Notices issued to 30 wayside eateries in Kochi after inspection finds unhygienic conditions
content: The action followed a joint inspection drive by the district Health department, Kochi Corporation and the Food Safety department. Two outlets were ordered to shut down

title: Forum seeks probe into ‘irregularities’ at Sanskrit varsity
content: The letter submitted to the Governor alleges irregularities in the use of funds, faculty appointments, admissions to PhD and other programmes, and the construction of the student amenities centre and auditorium on the main campus

title: Shiv Sena (UBT) issues show cause notices to six MPs for failing to attend parliamentary board meet
content: The action comes amidst speculation that the party is set to split again; one of the MPs, Omraje Nimbalkar, still undecided; rebels to meet Shiv Sena chief Eknath Shinde on June 21, but merger unlikely this week

title: Environmental clearance for Brigade housing project in Pallikaranai revoked
content: The State Environment Impact Assessment Authority found that the company had commenced construction without obtaining mandatory permission from the Tamil Nadu State Wetland Authority

title: Maharashtra local authorities biennial election records 99.02% voter turnout
content: The highest turnout was recorded in Bhandara-cum-Gondia, where all 457 voters cast their ballots, achieving 100% polling.

title: Students face technical glitches while applying for free bus passes in Karnataka
content: After assuming office as Chief Minister on June 3, Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar announced a free bus travel scheme for students studying across Karnataka.

title: Students develop AI solutions for document retrieval,  healthcare, and traffic management
content: The hackathon was conducted as part of the Tamil Nadu Skill Development Corporation’s Naan Mudhalvan programme

title: HC grants govt. two weeksto file affidavit on Phase II of seawall construction
content: The ₹404-crore seawall project from Puthenthode to Manassery was inaugurated on March 7; petition, filed by Chellanam-Kochi Janakeeya Vedhi, seeks measures to address sea incursion

title: PM Modi in Paris highlights: Prime Minister departs for New Delhi after concluding two-nation visit to France, Slovakia
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said, "From creating the world's largest digital identity system to the world's largest digital payments platforms, we are using technology at a massive scale for financial inclusion, education, telemedicine...,".

title: Maharashtra govt seeks to get mining rights for six iron ore mines in Gadchiroli
content: Over 40 mineral blocks in the State are ready for auction, and the process for 14 of the 34 has already started

title: W.B. Assembly session begins with Governor address, Budget on June 22
content: Governor Ravi in his 20-page address, commended the State government’s decision to strengthen border infrastructure and provide land to the BSF for erecting barbed-wire fencing along the W.B.- Bangladesh border

title: Meeting with government Secretaries: Pinarayi accuses Governor of violating constitutional conventions
content: The Chief Secretary has written to Lok Bhavan expressing the government’s dissatisfaction with the holding of such a meeting, says Chief Minister's Office

title: Delhi HC upholds Centre's Telegram ban order ahead of NEET retest
content: Delhi High Court upheld the Centre's temporary ban on Telegram, citing its potential misuse for exam fraud and misinformation ahead of the NEET-UG 2026 re-examination. The government's order, issued under the IT Act, was deemed well-founded. The restriction aims to prevent cheating rackets from exploiting the platform, with the ban in effect until June 22.

title: 'Dangerous sidelining of India': Former Trump aide rejects US-China 'G2' world order
content: Former US National Security Advisor John Bolton warned against a US-China "G2" framework, calling it a "dangerous sidelining" of India. He emphasized the critical need for closer India-US strategic cooperation to counter China's growing influence in the Indo-Pacific. Bolton also advocated for a deeper strategic dialogue between leaders focused on the China threat, beyond trade disputes.

title: Virat Kohli's injury recovery on track, star batter likely to return for England ODIs
content: Virat Kohli is making significant progress in his hamstring injury recovery and is on track to return for India's upcoming ODI series in England. He has begun rehabilitation and is expected to undergo a fitness assessment soon. The Indian ODI squad for the England tour will be selected later this week.

title: Iran to start charging fee in Strait of Hormuz after 60-day negotiation window: Report
content: Iran plans maritime transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz post-US agreement, despite ongoing regional tensions. Israel reaffirms its security zone in Lebanon and commitment to preventing Iran's nuclear ambitions. The US urges a ceasefire, while Iran seeks regional support for reconstruction. Economic recovery for Iran is expected to be gradual.

title: As Accenture shares fall 20%, Julie Sweet says investors are missing the point
content: Accenture's stock plummeted nearly 20% following fiscal third-quarter results that missed revenue expectations and showed a decline in new bookings. Despite the drop, CEO Julie Sweet urged investors to remain patient, highlighting the company's strong positioning for long-term growth driven by AI adoption and a revised salary structure to offer immediate cash to employees.

title: No Sachin, No Bumrah! Stuart Broad's all-time XI sparks massive debate
content: Former England bowler Stuart Broad unveiled his strongest Test XI from opponents faced, sparking fan debate.  The lineup features legends like Sangakkara, Ponting, and Kohli, but notably omits Sachin Tendulkar.  Broad's bowling attack includes Steyn, Johnson, and Muralitharan, with Jasprit Bumrah also surprisingly left out. This selection offers a unique perspective on Broad's most impactful rivals.

title: Main suspect held in killing of Sikh couple inside Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa gurdwara
content: Police in Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province have arrested the main suspect in the double murder of a Sikh caretaker couple. Jagannath and Asma Wanti were shot dead inside a gurdwara in Mardan district. The motive behind the killings remains unclear as investigations continue.

title: Dell CEO Michael Dell makes one of largest public university donations in US history
content: Michael Dell has gifted a staggering $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin, propelling the creation of a groundbreaking AI-native hospital and research campus. This substantial donation, adding to his family's legacy of support, will also bolster scholarships, advanced computing, and vital medical research, underscoring Dell's enduring connection to his alma mater.

title: Assam offers home loan subsidy of up to Rs 2.5 lakh: Eligibility & benefits explained
content: Assam's 'Aponar Apon Ghar' scheme offers substantial housing loan subsidies up to Rs 2.5 lakh for middle and lower-income families. Permanent residents with family incomes under Rs 20 lakh can avail this financial aid to purchase their first home. The initiative aims to boost home ownership by making loans more affordable, with eligibility and application details available online.

title: Psychiatrist explains why you pick at skin and nails during conversations
content: Unconscious nail biting and skin picking often stem from stress and anxiety, acting as ingrained coping mechanisms. Experts explain these automatic behaviors are triggered by the brain seeking comfort or relief. Self-awareness techniques and keeping hands busy can help, but persistent physical harm or distress necessitates professional intervention for underlying causes.

title: Musk responds as user points at ‘biggest single-day wealth decline’ in net worth tied to SpaceX
content: Senator Elizabeth Warren proposed taxing billionaires like Elon Musk to fund childcare, sparking a debate. A user highlighted Musk's significant paper wealth decline, calling the tax proposal a "joke." Musk responded sarcastically, "I will survive somehow," underscoring the ongoing discussion about taxing the ultra-rich and the nature of their assets.

title: ‘Respect his privacy’: Family issues emotional plea as Messi's father battles illness
content: Lionel Messi's father, Jorge Messi, is receiving medical treatment for an undisclosed illness. The Messi family has issued an emotional appeal for privacy and restraint from media and the public. They confirmed Jorge Messi is stable and progressing well. This comes after Lionel Messi spoke of personal difficulties following Argentina's World Cup win.

title: Harshit Rana joins India squad ahead of third ODI vs Afghanistan in Chennai
content: Fast bowler Harshit Rana has joined the India squad for the third ODI against Afghanistan after completing his rehabilitation. This move provides the team management with an extra pace option as they assess combinations for future tournaments. Rana's inclusion signals his importance in the selectors' long-term plans, aiming to build depth in the all-rounder department.

title: Rupee rebounds 20 paise to 94.20 on hopes of India-US trade deal
content: The Indian Rupee strengthened significantly against the US dollar on Friday, recovering from an all-time closing low. Optimism surrounding an India-US trade agreement, coupled with improved foreign inflows and softer crude oil prices, fueled the currency's rise. Discussions between Prime Minister Modi and President Trump highlighted progress on a trade pact, with further negotiations planned.

title: 'Monster bites back': India slams 'Frankenstein' Pakistan over terror links
content: India strongly criticized Pakistan at the UNHRC, labeling it a "Frankenstein state" that nurtures terrorism as state policy. India rejected Pakistan's allegations regarding Jammu and Kashmir, asserting the region's integral status and highlighting human rights violations in Pakistan-occupied territories.

title: AP SSC results declared: Pass percentage rises sharply to 82.39%
content: The Directorate of Government Examinations, Andhra Pradesh, has declared the SSC Advanced Supplementary Examinations May 2026 results with an overall pass percentage of 82.39%, a rise of 6.25 points from last year. Out of 94,990 candidates, 78,261 passed. Girls outperformed boys, while Prakasam district topped the state and NTR district recorded the lowest results. The improvement is credited to the government’s 20-Day Action Plan offering focused academic support and remedial coaching.

title: Phillips joins McCullum and Guptill, becomes 3rd New Zealand batter to...
content: Glenn Phillips achieved a historic maiden Test century, propelling New Zealand to a strong 391 against England.  Despite a fighting half-century from Emilio Gay, England faltered, losing key wickets to Matt Henry.  At stumps on Day 2, the hosts trail by 169 runs, facing a tough challenge to stay in the game.

title: DP of deceit: Ex-PM’s son loses Rs 7.8 crore to cyber scam
content: Former Rajya Sabha MP Naresh Gujral was defrauded of Rs 7.8 crore in a sophisticated cyber scam. Scammers impersonated him on a messaging platform and manipulated an employee's phone records to authorize multiple RTGS transfers. Police have successfully frozen Rs 4 crore of the stolen funds.

title: 'Trump is Israel's only ally': JD Vance's blunt message to Netanyahu over Iran deal criticism
content: US Vice President JD Vance issued a stern warning to Israeli critics of the US-Iran agreement, asserting Donald Trump is Israel's sole powerful ally. Vance defended the deal, criticizing Israeli cabinet members for their backlash and highlighting substantial US military aid. He urged them to re-evaluate their priorities amidst regional challenges.

title: 'Praying for his good health & long life': PM Modi wishes Rahul on 56th birthday
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended birthday wishes to Congress MP Rahul Gandhi on his 56th birthday. Several Congress leaders, including Mallikarjun Kharge and Pawan Khera, lauded Gandhi's dedication to constitutional values, social justice, and his resilience in politics. Leaders from Kerala also highlighted his journey and outreach efforts.

title: FIFA WC: Why is Vozinha valued at just Rs 40L, while Indians command 3x and more?
content: World Cup hero Vozinha stunned Spain and captured global attention, but his Rs 40 lakh market value sparked a heated debate in India. Why are several Indian players valued at two or three times more? Former internationals Robin Singh and Mehtab Hossain explain the economics, inflation and hidden forces shaping Indian football.

title: Watch: Crowds scatter as shots ring out in New York's Times Square
content: A shooting incident in New York's Times Square on Thursday resulted in one juvenile suspect being taken into custody and a firearm recovered. Video captured two individuals firing weapons before fleeing the scene. Authorities are actively searching for additional individuals involved in the incident, which occurred without reported injuries.

title: Ugly scenes after final whistle! Canada, Qatar players explode following Koné injury
content: Canada secured a historic 6-0 FIFA World Cup victory over Qatar, with Jonathan David scoring a hat-trick. However, the triumph was marred by a post-match confrontation. Tensions flared after a reckless tackle injured Canada's Ismaël Koné, leading to two Qatar red cards and a heated exchange between both teams.

title: NEET UG re-exam: NTA launches verified WhatsApp alerts to issue fraud warnings
content: The National Testing Agency has introduced verified WhatsApp alerts for NEET UG 2026 re-examination candidates, enabling direct delivery of exam-related updates and centre information. Alongside the initiative, NTA has warned aspirants against fraudulent messages, fake accounts and payment scams, urging them to rely only on official channels and download admit cards from the authorised NEET portal.

title: Jharkhand Rajya Sabha poll defeat: Who ditched Cong - its own MLAs or INDIA bloc allies?
content: Congress suffered a significant Rajya Sabha election defeat in Jharkhand, losing a seat despite having the required MLA support. The NDA-backed Independent candidate Parimal Nathwani secured victory, highlighting alleged cross-voting and a breakdown in coordination among INDIA bloc allies. This setback follows similar electoral challenges for the Congress in Bihar and Himachal Pradesh.

title: FIFA WC: Mexico become first team to reach Round of 32 after Romo strike sinks Korea
content: Mexico have secured a spot in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over South Korea. A goalkeeping blunder gifted Luis Romo the decisive goal, while goalkeeper Raúl Rangel's crucial saves sealed the win. This marks a strong tournament start for El Tri, guaranteeing them a place in the knockout stages.

title: SpaceX rally loses steam: Stock price falls over 6% after blockbuster debut week at Wall Street
content: SpaceX shares experienced a significant drop of over 6 percent on Thursday. This decline follows a period of strong post-IPO performance. Investors are now reassessing the company's valuation. The broader space sector also saw a dip in stock prices. SpaceX continues its focus on artificial intelligence initiatives.

title: Canada win turns emotional as Kone set to undergo surgery, Saliba pays touching tribute
content: Canada achieved a historic 6-0 FIFA World Cup win against Qatar, marked by Jonathan David's hat-trick. However, the victory was marred by a severe leg injury to Ismaël Koné, leading to a red card for Qatar's Assim Madibo. Substitute Nathan Saliba honored Koné with an emotional goal celebration, showcasing the team's spirit amidst the triumph.

title: T20 World Cup: Big blow for India! Shreyanka Patil ruled out, replacement named
content: India's ICC Women's T20 World Cup campaign faces a significant blow as off-spinner Shreyanka Patil is ruled out due to an ankle injury. Uncapped leg-spinner Prema Rawat has been named as her replacement, having impressed in domestic and developmental tournaments. Patil sustained the injury during the match against the Netherlands.

title: Oil prices edge higher after Vance threatens Israel against violating ceasefire
content: Oil prices experienced volatility following US Vice President JD Vance's comments, raising concerns about the Iran-US ceasefire's stability. Brent and WTI crude saw declines as Vance warned Israel against further attacks on Hezbollah, casting doubt on the accord's durability. The market now watches the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil transit route, for signs of recovery under the new agreement.

title: NEET leak row: Why curtail rights of 150m users for a retest, Delhi HC asks on Telegram ban
content: Delhi High Court will deliver its verdict on Telegram's challenge to a temporary ban imposed by the Centre. The court questioned how 150 million users' rights could be curtailed due to an exam, while the Centre highlighted Telegram's architecture as a "Frankenstein" prone to misuse and evidence deletion.

title: 'Still a kid': BCCI explains why parents will accompany Sooryavanshi on England tour
content: India's youngest cricket prodigy, 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, will have his parents accompany him on his maiden senior national tour to Ireland and England. This unprecedented decision by the BCCI aims to help the young opener adjust to an adult environment, ensuring his comfort and well-being as he embarks on his international career.

title: HDFC said to have put freeze on TMC account, Mamata faction calls it 'baseless rumor'
content: Former West Bengal sports minister Aroop Biswas requested HDFC Bank to freeze the Trinamool Congress's account, citing a dispute over party control following his removal as treasurer. The bank reportedly placed a debit freeze on the account, which holds Rs 535 crore, though the party disputes this claim.

title: 'Unfortunately, there isn't a slot': Ex-India captain's blunt verdict on Ishan Kishan
content: Former captain Krishnamachari Srikkanth sees Test potential in Ishan Kishan, currently sidelined by a packed Indian team. He also highlights Yashasvi Jaiswal as an all-format player deserving more white-ball chances. Srikkanth notes the difficulty in selection due to top-order talent and calls for continuity in team choices for domestic performers.

title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: JD Vance Cancels Switzerland Visit, Hormuz Movement Resumes
content: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

title: Shiv Sena (UBT) Crisis Live: 6 Team Uddhav Rebels Get 'Y-Plus' Security Amid Threats
content: Uddhav Thackeray Shiv Sena Crisis Live: Shiv Sena (Uddhav camp) MP Sanjay Raut alleged that Rs 15 crore was being paid individually to "buy MPs".

title: Stock Market Crash: Accenture Sparks IT Bloodbath; Investors Lose Rs 2 Trillion
content: The sharp decline highlights a growing concern on Dalal Street: if Accenture is seeing weak demand, Indian IT companies could face similar challenges.

title: Chanting Mantras Made Mandatory In Chhattisgarh Government Schools, Row Erupts
content: Defending the move, Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai said the initiative is aimed at character-building for children.

title: Video: Moment Horse Bolted In New York's Central Park, Leading To Indian Tourist's Death
content: Romanch Mahajan, 18, died as he got off of the four-wheeled carriage to save his mother, who had fallen after the horse sprinted through the park without the driver.

title: How Donald Trump's Iran Deal Differs From Barack Obama's 2015 Agreement
content: Both deals involve a written commitment by Iran never to seek a nuclear weapon. Trump - who declared the nuclear threat his main reason for going to war - has insisted, incorrectly, that Tehran had never done so before.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Slides 700 Points As Accenture Drags IT Stocks
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Oil prices edge higher after JD Vance threatened Israel against violating ceasefire.

title: As India Plans Nuclear Scale-Up, Watchdog Confirms Zero Accident Record
content: Amgad Shokr, Director, Incident and Emergency Center, International Atomic Energy Agency, Vienna, Austria confirms India has not had any nuclear accident till date.

title: UK Labour's Andy Burnham Wins Key Election, Mounts Challenge To Keir Starmer
content: Andy Burnham decisively won the seat of Makerfield in northwest England over Rob Kenyon of the anti-immigration party Reform UK.

title: Zohran Mamdani Calls To Ban Horse Carriages In New York After Indian Teen's Death
content: Mayor Zohran Mamdani backed ending the industry, saying he'd work with all sides to protect workers while phasing out horse-drawn carriages in Central Park.

title: Trump Flexes Muscle On US-Iran Deal, Says 'No Limits To My Power'
content: Trump insisted that the deal showed the deal was not a reflection on his power, but was rather a move to get the oil moving to avoid global depression.

title: JD Vance Postpones Switzerland Visit For Iran Talks
content: The team led by Vice President JD Vance had been ready to leave but was postponing, the White House said, citing difficult logistics for negotiations.

title: "Gets Shocked When Its Monster Bites Back": India Calls Pak "Frankenstein State" At UN
content: Indian diplomat Anupama Singh also called out Islamabad's "propaganda", referring to "repression" in Pakistan-occupied Jammu and Kashmir.

title: Video: 1 Hurt As Shots Fired At New York's Times Square, People Run For Cover
content: Videos shared on social media captured the moment the shots rang out, prompting people in Times Square to run for safety.

title: 90 Minutes To Shutdown: How A US Order On AI Model Shook Businesses Across World
content: Unlike traditional AI systems, advanced models such as Fable 5 possess capabilities that can significantly accelerate cybersecurity research.

title: 'Last Ride': US Says Goodbye To Air Force One, Qatari Jet To Join Fleet
content: The goodbye messages fuelled speculation that a Boeing 747 controversially gifted to President Donald Trump by the Gulf emirate of Qatar is now due to enter service.

title: Democrats Say $350 Million From Trump Tax Bill Funds White House Ballroom
content: Apportionment of funds comes from two accounts intended to provide US Secret Service with extra money for training in aftermath of last year's assassination attempts on president, as per Democrats

title: Versailles II: Trump signs Iran deal in the one place historians wouldn't recommend
content: the art of the deal met the ghost of Versailles . he signed a controversial MoU committing to help finance Iran's reconstruction . the symbolism was so on-the-nose that even Hollywood script editors would have rejected it as implausible .

title: 'Hang me': South Delhi doctor tells cops after killing house help with kitchen knife
content: Devanshi Mehta is a crime correspondent uncovering Delhi’s unseen crisis—addiction, systemic violence, and the quiet suffering of women, children, and marginalised communities. Her reporting brings nuance to the headlines, focusing on those forgotten by the system. Through deeply reported stories, she explores the human cost of crime, neglect, and broken justice. Read More

title: As Shiv Sena turns 60 today, rival camps set for verbal joust
content: the party will have a showdown at the party's foundation day events in Mumbai on friday . 'Operation Tiger' is now almost complete and the merger of rebel Sena UBT MPs with the deputy CM Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena said to be a formality .

title: TMC implosion, NCP split and Congress question: Why 'ghar wapsi' may not be the answer
content: Priyanka Mukherjee is an Assistant News Editor at The Times of India, where deadlines rarely slow down. Often juggling breaking news, long-form explainers and the everyday chaos of the newsroom, she is usually managing stress, chasing clarity and trying to log off on time (rarely successful). She also cares deeply about stories around women’s rights and social change, while two very opinionated dogs make sure she never truly switches off. Read More

title: Significant progress already made: MEA on interim US FTA
content: india-US interim free trade bilateral agreement in final stages . govt says significant progress has already been made on the agreement . india expects the agreement to lead to sustained peace and stability in the region . the two countries are in the final stages of concluding that agreement, foreign secretary says .
